description: Benchmark and research artifact registry for Willow 2.0. Links tracked repo artifacts and repo-safe local pointers without merging incompatible schemas.

visibility_legend.tracked: Artifact lives in this repo and is safe to cite directly.
visibility_legend.local_pointer: Artifact exists locally; catalog uses symbolic paths ($NEST, etc.).
visibility_legend.private_context: Research context exists but exact paths or transcript IDs are not published.

entries.title: Cartographer Code-Memory Sidecar
entries.summary: Controlled prompt test for codebase-memory-mcp tool use across Claude models before Willow boot.
entries.notes: Does not mutate Nest canonical benchmark DBs.

entries.title: Claude Field Benchmark Report — June 2026
entries.summary: Observational field benchmark of real Willow agent sessions across Opus 4.8, Fable 5, and Sonnet 4.6.
entries.notes: Sidecar DB claude_benchmarks_recent_models_sidecar.db lives under $NEST; canonical claude_benchmarks.db was not mutated.

entries.title: Nest Session Benchmark Corpus
entries.summary: Scientific harness for Claude/Cursor agent session transcripts — parser, canonical DB, cross-runtime connector, and full-session reports.
entries.notes: $NEST resolves to the operator Desktop/Nest export directory. Separate from Willow Postgres KB.

entries.title: Fleet Retrieval Gold Gate
entries.summary: KB hybrid retrieval regression gate — gold queries with expected atom IDs or title fragments.
entries.notes: min_pass_ratio default 0.71. Runs against live fleet KB via Postgres.

entries.title: LoCoMo / LongMemEval Path A
entries.summary: External memory benchmarks with Willow Postgres KB as the memory backend — recall@k, MRR, token F1.
entries.notes: Hypotheses JSONL written per run. Baselines recorded via benchmark_record_path_a_baseline.py.

entries.title: Ollama Full-Suite Benchmark
entries.summary: Local Ollama model prompt suite — startup coherence, JSON, reasoning, code, instruction following.
entries.notes: Last snapshot run 2026-05-17. Requires local Ollama.

entries.title: Node9 Policy Bridge Latency
entries.summary: Microbenchmark for @node9/policy-engine pass latency via the Willow bridge.
entries.notes: Requires WILLOW_NODE9_POLICY=1 and npm install in sap/adapters/node9_policy.

entries.title: Larousse ↔ Path A Ephemeris Pattern
entries.summary: Research-pattern link between Larousse astronomy ephemeris and Path A memory phase preservation under repetition.
entries.notes: Pattern-level link, not an operational dependency. KB atoms 574CD95D, 2242989F.
